title: Phase 5 sidecar — assets
description: Structured asset inventory the Phase-5 (Asset Identification) LLM persists at PHASE_END. Consumed by scripts/build_threat_model_yaml.py to populate threat-model.yaml[assets[]] without re-composing from working memory in Phase 11. See docs/substep2-deterministic-migration.md §2.2.

assets.description: Assets requiring protection — Restricted/Confidential/Internal data, key material, credentials.

id.description: Stable asset ID — MUST come from scripts/reserve_ids.py asset --count N. Never hand-pick; collides with prior runs in incremental mode.

classification.description: Data classification per common 4-tier policy. Renders in §4 Assets Register column 2.

description.description: 1-3 sentence summary of what the asset is, where it lives, why it matters.

linked_threats.description: T-IDs of threats that target this asset. Cross-ref validated by aggregator — orphan T-IDs surface as advisory warnings.

additions.description: Assets emerging from later phases (e.g., build artifacts identified in Phase 10 cross-phase synthesis). Same item schema as assets[].
